name: 150W UFO High Bay Light AC 120-277V CCT 5000K
description: The ZION LED USA 150W LED UFO High Bay Light delivers outstanding brightness and energy efficiency, making it the ideal solution for large-scale lighting in industrial and commercial environments. Designed for performance and ease of use, it features high luminous efficacy, advanced dimming capabilities, and optional smart controls to enhance both energy savings and lighting flexibility. Choose the  ZION LED USA 150W LED UFO High Bay Light for a lighting solution that combines efficiency, control, and performance in one durable, easy-to-install package.
short_desc: ZION LED USA 150W LED UFO High Bay Light – High Voltage, Maximum Brightness for Demanding Commercial & Industrial Applications. Key Features: Exceptional Efficiency: Produces an impressive 150 lumens per watt, delivering powerful brightness with reduced energy consumption. Dimmable Control: Equipped with 0-10V dimming functionality for adjustable light output tailored to your needs. Wide Voltage Compatibility: Operates on AC 120-277V input, ensuring seamless integration with various electrical systems. Hassle-Free Installation: Includes a 5-foot cable for quick and convenient setup. Smart Sensor Ready: Optional occupancy sensor available for automatic on/off functionality and additional energy savings. Wide Beam Angle: High-transparency PC lens with a 120° beam angle for broad, uniform light distribution. Ideal Applications: Perfect for lighting large indoor areas, such as: Warehouses – Bright, efficient lighting for safe and productive workspaces. Factories – Reliable illumination for complex industrial tasks. Workshops – Clear, consistent light for precision and craftsmanship. Gymnasiums – Wide beam coverage for sports and recreational areas. Commercial Spaces – Suitable for supermarkets, big-box stores, and other large-format retail settings.
